summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Marmitaria da Xai website focusing on weekly menu system with day selector tabs, auto-detection of current day, and all iFood-style features. All functionality working perfectly including today's menu auto-detection (Monday=Strogonoff), day selector tabs with HOJE badge, Google Maps integration, WhatsApp integration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Navbar with iFood-style red design and all navigation links (Cardápio, Entrega, Como Funciona, Localização, Contato)
Hero section auto-detects and displays today's menu (Monday - Strogonoff de Frango) with SEGUNDA-FEIRA badge
Day selector tabs (SEG, TER, QUA, QUI, SEX, SÁB) with HOJE badge correctly shown on current day (Monday)
Day tab clicking functionality - successfully tested clicking different days and menu changes (SEG→TER→QUA→QUI)
Menu content changes correctly: Strogonoff → Bife Acebolado → Frango Assado → Picadinho de Carne
Features bar with 4 items displayed properly
Gallery section with 4 food images loading correctly
Delivery section with WhatsApp integration button
How it works section with all 4 steps present
Testimonials section with 3 customer cards and star ratings
Location section with Google Maps iframe embedded correctly
Contact form with all required fields (name, WhatsApp, address, marmita select, size select, notes)
Form submission functionality - form fills correctly and submit button ready for WhatsApp integration
WhatsApp floating button present and functional
Mobile responsive hamburger menu opens correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Footer with Instagram link and business contact information
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for robust testing
iFood-style color scheme (#EA1D2C red and white) implemented throughout
Real food images from customer assets loading properly
All WhatsApp integrations contain correct phone number and messaging
